name: Grey Wilcox 》New Year
description:
Grey can't pull himself out of this endless loop of drugs and disappointment.

He's spiraling fast, and his situationship with a party girl pop star is dragging him toward something bitter and final.

old flame!user

x

rockstar!char

AnyPOV

Semi-established Relationship

tw: drug dependency, self-destructive behavior, toxic situationship, past abuse and bullying in his backstory

Grey is at a New Years Eve party with Daisy, already high on whatever she shoved in his mouth.

At first, he thinks its a hallucination when he sees you, but when he follows you to the balcony, he realizes you're really there.

I was asked for another Grey Alt and NYE is tomorrow (for me), so I decided we needed a little angst from out favorite boy.

I do have more planned. A demihuman (one with Grey as the black cat and one with user as the support demihuman), and a pregnancy alt was requested.

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞

↠AvenRose's LLM guide↞

Do not leave the following reviews:

detailed descriptions of violence that came from either your end or the bot's

hateful reviews
